research_profile.method_preference: Prefer conservative, scientifically grounded methods with careful controls and restrained claims.

resource_profile.feasibility_bias: Prefer reproducible designs with explicit assumptions and controlled compute.

writing_profile.section_organization: Journal-style with dense evidence and careful limitations.

interaction_profile.priority_feedback: Scientific plausibility, evidence gaps, or overstated generality.
interaction_profile.unacceptable_errors: Overclaiming biological/physical conclusions or under-specifying data provenance.

planning_prompt_focus.feasibility_bias: Prefer reproducible designs with explicit assumptions and controlled compute.

persona_brief: AI4Science journal persona that prefers conservative claims, careful ablations, and strong scientific grounding.
